name: Buy & Sell Outlet
description_short: Buy & Sell Outlet is a pawn shop in Washington, PA that buys used goods and offers in-store pickup. Established in 2011, they accept multiple payment methods and are wheelchair accessible.
description_long:
Buy & Sell Outlet has operated as a pawn shop in Washington, Pennsylvania since 2011, establishing itself as a fixture in the downtown Main Street business district. The business is located at 172 S Main St and serves the local community's collateral-based lending and used goods trading needs. With over a decade of operation, the company has built a customer base of 103+ documented visits to their listing.

The shop's primary offering is buying used goods from customers, a core pawn shop function that provides quick liquidity for those looking to sell personal items. They maintain flexible operating hours (10 AM–5:30 PM Monday through Saturday, closed Sundays) to accommodate working customers. The business accepts multiple forms of payment including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, debit cards, and personal checks, providing customers with payment flexibility when selling items.

What distinguishes Buy & Sell Outlet is their commitment to accessibility—they are wheelchair accessible, an important feature not all pawn shops highlight. Their downtown Main Street location makes them easily accessible to foot traffic in Washington's business district. The business offers in-store pickup as a service option, suggesting they may facilitate transactions beyond simple walk-in purchases.

The company maintains minimal digital presence—no website, email, or extensive online information is provided. The business listing contains limited details about specific inventory, loan terms, interest rates, or the full range of services typically offered by pawn shops (such as collateral loans or pawn transactions). No customer reviews are available on the listing, making it difficult to assess service quality, pricing competitiveness, or customer satisfaction relative to competitors like Ez Cash (0.5 miles away) or Pawn'ee Shop (6.9 miles away).
pros: Wheelchair accessible location on Main Street for easy community access
Flexible Saturday hours (10 AM–5:30 PM) accommodating weekend shoppers
Accepts multiple payment methods: Visa, MasterCard, Amex, debit, and personal checks
Established business with 13+ years of operation since 2011
In-store pickup service option for convenience
Conveniently located in downtown Washington's Main Street business district
cons: No website or online presence limits transparency about inventory, pricing, or loan terms
No customer reviews available to assess service quality or competitiveness
Limited operating hours (closed Sundays) may be inconvenient for some customers
Business listing lacks details about specific services offered beyond 'buying used goods'
best_for: Local Washington, PA residents needing quick cash for used items they own
Customers seeking accessible pawn shop services with wheelchair accommodation
Those preferring in-person transactions and cash payments for used goods
diagnosis: Buy & Sell Outlet is appropriate for local Washington, PA residents who need to quickly sell personal items for cash and value wheelchair accessibility and flexible Saturday hours. However, prospective customers should note the company's minimal digital transparency—no reviews, website, or detailed service descriptions are available—making it important to call (724-249-2325) first to confirm specific services, inventory focus, and competitive pricing before visiting.
